message:
feat(web): Add history tracking to packaging motor simulation

Implement time-series history for the DNA packaging motor simulation,
enabling visualization of pressure, force, and fill fraction over time.

simulation.worker.ts changes:
- Extend PackagingMotorState with history array tracking time, fill,
  pressure, and force values at each simulation step
- Initialize history with starting values in initPackaging()
- Append new data points in stepPackaging() with 600-point rolling
  window (slice(-600)) to bound memory usage
- Preserve history through state spreading for immutable updates

PackagingMotorVisualizer.tsx changes:
- Extract history from state with fallback to single-point array for
  backwards compatibility with states lacking history
- Sort history by time to ensure correct plot ordering
- Fix HiDPI canvas rendering: ctx.setTransform() instead of ctx.scale()
- Refactor gauge rendering into reusable drawGauge() helper
- Add COLORS constant for consistent pressure/force/fill coloring
- Render three-line time series plot (pressure, force, fill %)
- Add axis labels ("Time" x-axis, descriptive title)
- Increase force gauge max from 120 to 200 to match actual range
- Adjust layout: tighter vertical spacing, proper bottom margin

The history visualization shows how internal capsid pressure builds
as DNA is packaged, and how motor force responds to resist ejection
pressure - key insights for understanding phage DNA packaging dynamics.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
